name: ICU Labs — Persistent Fevers / Worsening (Day ~16)

results.name: CBC — WBC
results.interpretation: Not rising despite the persistent fevers — no escalating leukocytosis to suggest progressive infection.

results.name: Procalcitonin
results.interpretation: NOT elevated — does not support an ongoing bacterial infection.

interpretation: After ~2 weeks, MELD ~40 (worsening bilirubin, INR, creatinine). Critically, the infectious workup is UNREVEALING: blood cultures with no growth, procalcitonin not elevated, and WBC not rising despite continued high fevers and a two-pressor requirement. A mild peripheral eosinophilia is present. The data do not support an ongoing, source-identified bacterial infection driving the fevers.
